---
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    formats: ipynb,Rmd
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.19.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---

```{python}
import re
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Literal

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
import polars as pl
import umap
from IPython.display import HTML
from matplotlib.animation import FuncAnimation
from sklearn.decomposition import PCA
from sklearn.discriminant_analysis import LinearDiscriminantAnalysis
```

```{python}
# %cd ..
```

```{python}
METHOD = "pca"
```

```{python}
def get_epoch_from_path(p: Path) -> str:
    return re.search(r"_e(\d+)_", p.stem).group(1)


def train_projector(df: pl.DataFrame, method: Literal["pca", "lda", "umap"], dim: int = 2):
    X = df["embedding"].to_numpy()

    if method == "pca":
        proj = PCA(n_components=dim)
        proj.fit(X)
        return proj

    if method == "lda":
        y = df["label"].to_numpy()
        proj = LinearDiscriminantAnalysis(n_components=dim)
        proj.fit(X, y)
        return proj

    if method == "umap":
        proj = umap.UMAP(n_components=dim)
        proj.fit(X)
        return proj

    raise ValueError(f"Unknown method: {method}")
```

```{python}
path_list = sorted(Path("results/cub200/").glob("cub200_vit_reg4_so150m_p14_ls_dino-v2-bio*.parquet"))
label_expr = pl.col("sample").str.extract(r"/([^/]+)/[^/]+$").alias("label")
```

```{python}
latest_embeddings = pl.read_parquet(path_list[-1]).with_columns(label_expr)
projector = train_projector(latest_embeddings, method=METHOD)

all_labels = sorted(latest_embeddings["label"].unique().to_list())
label_to_id = {lab: i for i, lab in enumerate(all_labels)}
```

```{python}
def compute_bounds(array_list, n_components: int):
    mins = np.full(n_components, np.inf)
    maxs = np.full(n_components, -np.inf)

    for array in array_list:
        mins = np.minimum(mins, array.min(axis=0))
        maxs = np.maximum(maxs, array.max(axis=0))

    pad = 0.05 * (maxs - mins)
    return mins - pad, maxs + pad
```

```{python}
projection_list = []
color_list = []
for i, p in enumerate(path_list):
    df = pl.read_parquet(p).with_columns(label_expr)
    projection_list.append(projector.transform(df["embedding"].to_numpy()))

    labels = df["label"].to_list()
    color_list.append(np.array([label_to_id[l] for l in labels], dtype=int))
```

```{python}
bounds = compute_bounds(projection_list, n_components=2)
```

```{python}
n = len(path_list)
ncols = 3
nrows = (n + ncols - 1) // ncols

fig, axes = plt.subplots(nrows=nrows, ncols=ncols, figsize=(5.5 * ncols, 4.5 * nrows), squeeze=False)
axes = axes.ravel()
cmap = "turbo"

for i, (XY, c) in enumerate(zip(projection_list, color_list)):

    ax = axes[i]

    sc = ax.scatter(XY[:, 0], XY[:, 1], c=c, cmap=cmap, s=6, alpha=0.7, linewidths=0)
    ax.set_title(f"Epoch {get_epoch_from_path(path_list[i])}", fontsize=12)
    ax.set_xlim(bounds[0][0], bounds[1][0])
    ax.set_ylim(bounds[0][1], bounds[1][1])

for j in range(n, nrows * ncols):
    axes[j].axis("off")

fig.tight_layout()
```

```{python}
latest_embeddings = pl.read_parquet(path_list[-1]).with_columns(label_expr)
projector = train_projector(latest_embeddings, method=METHOD, dim=3)
```

```{python}
projection_list = []
color_list = []
for i, p in enumerate(path_list):
    df = pl.read_parquet(p).with_columns(label_expr)
    projection_list.append(projector.transform(df["embedding"].to_numpy()))

    labels = df["label"].to_list()
    color_list.append(np.array([label_to_id[l] for l in labels], dtype=int))
```

```{python}
bounds = compute_bounds(projection_list, n_components=3)
```

```{python}
cmap = "turbo"
interval = 1000

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection="3d")
scatter = ax.scatter(
    projection_list[0][:, 0],
    projection_list[0][:, 1],
    projection_list[0][:, 2],
    c=color_list[0],
    cmap=cmap,
    s=4,
    alpha=0.65,
    linewidths=0,
)
ax.set_xlim(bounds[0][0], bounds[1][0])
ax.set_ylim(bounds[0][1], bounds[1][1])
ax.set_zlim(bounds[0][2], bounds[1][2])
ax.set_xlabel("Component 1")
ax.set_ylabel("Component 2")
ax.set_zlabel("Component 3")
# ax.view_init(elev=24, azim=35)
title = ax.set_title(f"Epoch {get_epoch_from_path(path_list[0])}")


def update(i: int):
    scatter._offsets3d = (projection_list[i][:, 0], projection_list[i][:, 1], projection_list[i][:, 2])
    scatter.set_array(color_list[i])
    title.set_text(f"Epoch {get_epoch_from_path(path_list[i])}")
    return scatter, title


anim = FuncAnimation(fig, update, frames=len(projection_list), interval=interval, blit=False)
html = HTML(anim.to_jshtml())
plt.close(fig)
html
```
